name: ppt-design
description: A presentation design bundle containing frontend-slides, baoyu-design, and html-ppt without renaming or merging the three skills.

interface.shortDescription: Three complementary skills for editable HTML and PowerPoint presentations.
interface.longDescription: PPT Design packages frontend-slides, baoyu-design, and html-ppt as three independent, unchanged skills in one installable Codex plugin.
defaultPrompt: 使用 frontend-slides、baoyu-design 和 html-ppt 制作可编辑商业演示文稿。
把现有项目整理为带动画的 HTML 幻灯片，并导出可编辑 PPTX。
